subcodes.first_line: O thou who art longing for the Kingdom of Abha! That which thou didst write became known and manifest. Although the pen of this servant in these days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق ملکوت ابهی آنچه نگاشتی معلوم و واضح گشت هر چند کلک این عبد ایامی
subcodes.subjects: @chastity and purity, @martyrs and martyrdom, @role and station of women
